Rengdil khaw daiah dan lova thingphur truck pakhat leh Bungthuam khua-ah truck pakhat man a ni a.Heng thing phurhte hi state pawn - Assam lama phurh an tum nia hriat a ni.

Kawrthah Forest Division thawktute chuan kan ramngaw hausakna humhalh kawngah khauh taka hma lak zel an tum a, patrol leh checking te pawh uluk lehzuala kalpui tum a ni a, dan lova thing phur chhuak emaw, thil dik lo ti hmute chu Range Office hnai berah hriattir turin Kawrthah Forest Division chuan mipuite an ngen a ni.

title: Lunglei District Magistrate-in tuialhthei phurh chhuah chungchangah hriattirna a chhuah
content:
4948/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 20:Tun lai hian Lunglei District huam chhungah phalna nei lote'n ṭhenawm ram Myanmar leh ram danga hralh tur tuialhthei (petrol leh diesel) an phur chhuak ṭhin nia report dawn a nih avangin vawiin khan Lunglei District Magistrate Pi Navneet Mann chuan Lunglei District aṭanga ṭhenawm ram Myanmar-a hralh tur tuialhthei phurh chhuah khap a nih thu hriattirna a chhuah.

Tuialhthei phurh chhuah phalna/storage licence nei lova tuialhthei phurh chhuah hi The Petroleum Rules, 2002 Rule 3 chuan a khap tlat thu leh dan zawm lote chu dan hmang vekin na taka hrem theih an nih thu tar langin, Lunglei District huam chhungah tuialhthei (petrol leh diesel) zuartute'n mipui (customer) hnenah tuialhthei hnianghnar taka an pek chhuah theih nan ṭhenawm ram Myanmar-a hralh tur tuialhthei phurh chhuah hi khap tlat a nih thu a tar lang.

He thupek zawm lote chu The Petroleum Act, 1934 Section 23 leh Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 Section 163 tlawh chhanin an chungah hremna lek kawh theih a ni ang, tih a tar lang tel bawk.

content:
4946/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 20th March, 2026: Vawiin khan National Oral Health Programme (NOHP) buatsaihin DHME Auditorium, MINECO-ah World Oral Health Day lawmna hun hman a ni a. Kumin hian thupui atan ‘A happy mouth is A happy life’ tih hman a ni.

Vawiin hunah hi Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma Mission Director, National Health Mission (NHM)-in kaihruaiin, kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Dr. F. Lalfamkima, State Nodal Officer (NOHP)-in thu tawi sawiin, Dr. Lalruatfeli, MDS-in powerpoint presentation hmangin Oral Health chungchang a zirtir a. Health Worker Training School zirlaite leh Tv. J. title: MUMBAI-AH CHAPCHAR KUT HMAN A NI
content:
4945/2025-2026

Dated Mumbai, the 20th March, 2026:Nimin, March ni 19, 2026 (Ningani) khan Mumbai Mizo Association (MMA) chuan Mumbai khawpuia Mizo chengte tan Chapchar Kut a buatsaih a. Pu V. Malsawmtluanga, MLA leh Lunglei HPC Vice Chairman chu Kut Pa a ni.

Kut Pa Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan Mumbai khawpuia Mizote chu tlawmngaihna vawng nung tlat tur leh Zonun zemawi hnamdang karah pawh lan chhuahtir zel turin a fuih a. Ruihhlo laka fihlim hram hram tur te, mahni hna thawhna hrang hranga rinawm taka thawk tur leh zirlaite pawh thahnemngai tak leh hlawhtling ngei ngei tura zir turin a fuih a ni.

Mumbai-a Chapchar Kut hmannaah hian MMA President leh Mizoram House DRC ni bawk Pu H. Lalruatliana pawhin thu a sawi a. MMA Treasurer Pi Zohmangaihzuali’n inkhawm a kaihruai a. Mizo Students & Youth of Mumbai (MSYM)-te’n hnam lam chi hrang hrang an entir a. Mizoram atangin zaithiam Taitea Pautu leh Ruatpuii-te’n Chapchar Kut hi an hmanpui bawk a ni.

Chapchar Kut hmannaah hian Mumbai Mizo mi 700 chuang an kal khawm a. Zanriah an kilho nghal a ni. Kum dang zawng aiin kumin Chapchar Kut hmangtu hi an thahnem a ni.

title: ONE DAY TRAINING ON ‘CYBER CRIME’ CONDUCTED
content:
Dated Aizawl, the 20th March 2026 :A one-day training on “Cyber Crime” was organized this morning at the Gauhati High Court, Aizawl Bench Conference Hall. The program was jointly organized by Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA) and Mizoram Police.

The inaugural session was attended by Hon’ble Mr. Justice Michael Zothankhuma, Judge, Gauhati High Court & Judge-in-Charge, Administration Department (JAD), GHC and the Executive Chairman of the Assam State Legal Services Authority; Hon’ble Mr. Justice Nelson Sailo, Judge, Gauhati High Court and Executive Chairman of MSLSA; Hon’ble Mr. Justice Sanjeev Kumar Sharma, Judge, Gauhati High Court; Mr. Sharad Agarwal, Director General of Police(DGP), Government of Mizoram; and Mrs. Helen Dawngliani, District & Sessions Judge and Chairman of DLSA, Aizawl Judicial District.

Justice Michael Zothankhuma, in his address, shared that he himself had experienced cyber crime and expressed appreciation for organizing such a valuable training session. He stated that in today’s rapidly evolving and interconnected technological world, cyber crime has become an emerging threat worldwide as it is a crime without borders. Hence, laws often take time to adapt which creates gaps between emerging crimes and the legal framework which is meant to prevent and punish them. To bridge this gap and effectively combat cyber crime, cooperation among law enforcement agencies, police, and the judiciary is essential. He also emphasized that Public Awareness is the first line of defense against cyber crime. He wished the participants to have a fruitful training and to be someone who contributes to educating the society further.

Justice Nelson Sailo mentioned that in 2017, the Supreme Court recognized the “Right to Privacy” as a Fundamental Right under Article 21 of the Indian Constitutionsss. Following this, Parliament passed the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP Act) in 2023 to safeguard citizens’ data rights. He highlighted that cyber crime is rapidly increasing in India, with over 86,000 cases registered in 2023. In Mizoram, 361 cyber crime cases were recorded between 2022 and 2026, with 5 cases being already registered up to March this year. The most common cases include financial fraud, social media impersonation, and sexual harassment. He advised the public to use antivirus software, avoid opening or downloading unknown files, and report incidents promptly to the police.

DGP Sharad Agarwal also addressed the gathering, stating that the rapid rise in cyber crime has posed significant challenges to law enforcement agencies. He noted that modern technologies like Artificial Intelligence (AI) are increasingly being used in phishing and creating deepfake images and videos, as well as for stealing passwords and spreading malware. To combat cyber crime, Mizoram Police has established a Technical Support Cell and is using digital forensic tools to analyze data securely.

Mrs. Helen Dawngliani, in her speech, outlined various types of cyber crime. She said that while technological advancements have made life easier, they have also increased opportunities for crime. She emphasized that in order to preserve Rule of Law in the digital sphere, there is a need for stronger collaboration between the police and judiciary.

Following the inaugural session, technical sessions were conducted. Dr. Harold D’Costa, President of Cyber Security Corporation and International Trainer in Digital Forensics and Cyber Law, led the training. SP (Cyber Crime) Mr. Zonunsanga and Mrs. JH Lalparmawii, JMFC-cum-Civil Judge (Jr. Division), District Court Aizawl, also gave presentations on topics related to cyber crime. Mrs. Meghna Yadav, IGP (Training) delivered the concluding remarks. The training was attended by officials from various departments including Home, Excise & Narcotics, Finance, and others.

Attachment

Dated : Mamit the 20th of March,2026 :Kum 2025-2026 atan Leiman/Zoramchhiah khawn mek chu Mamit District chhungah khawn zawh fel a ni tawh a, Veng tina VC huam chhunga khawn hun laia pe hman lo te leh la pe lo ten pe theuh turin kan in ngen a ni.

A hnuaia Link kan dah ah hian emaw QR Code kan dah ah hian chhiah hi Dt.27.03.2026 thleng a pek theih a, Dt.28.03.2026 atang hian Portal (Chhiah pekna) hi khar a nih tawh dawn avangin chhiah hi pek theuh tur a ni. title: ASF HRI A DARH ZEL LOH NAN SERCHHIP DC CHUAN KHAPNA THUPEK A TICHHUAK
content:
4942/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 20th March, 2026:Tunlai hian Serchhip veng thenkhatah African Swine Fever (ASF) avangin Vawk thi leh Vawk damlo hmuh a ni a. Serchhip District chhunga ASF hri hi a darh zel loh nan a hnuaia mi ang hian Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 tlawh chhanin vawiin khan khapna thupek a tichhuak.

1. Serchhip District chhungah ram dang (Foreign countries), State dang leh District dang atangin Vawk, Vawksa leh Vawksa atanga siam thil reng reng lakluh leh thawn chhuah khap a ni.

2. Serchhip District chhunga khua leh khua, Veng leh Veng te Vawk inlak pawlh khap tlat a ni.

3. Vawk damlo reng reng talh leh hralh khap tlat a ni

4. Vawk damlo chu dah hran vat tur a ni.

5. Vawk damlo leh thi reng reng chu A.H & Vety. Department thawktu te hnenah hriattir vat tur a ni.

6. Vawk thi reng reng uluk takin Disinfectant nen thuk taka phumbo tur a ni.

He thupek hian thu leh awm hma chu Order chhuah a nih (20.3.2026) atanga thla 2 (two months) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek zawm lo chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Naya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

title: Lunglei District-ah ASF vanga vawk suat 3,443 te zangnadawmna cheng nuai 214.92 pek chhuah a ni
content:
4941/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 20:Animal Husbandry & Veterinary (AH&Vety) Deparment, Lunglei District chuan kum 2024 chhunga vawk pul hri, African Swine Fever (ASF) avanga vawk suat 3,443 te zangnadawmna cheng nuai 214.92 (₹2,14,92,775/-) chu March ni 6–20, 2026 chhung khan a tuartu chhungkaw 623 te hnenah an pe chhuak.

He zangnadawmna hi ASCAD (Assistance to States for Control of Animal Diseases) hnuai atang leh State share aṭanga pek chhuah a ni a. A dawngtute bank account-ah Direct Benefit Transfer-a thun a ni.

title: KOLASIB-AH DISTRICT LEVEL WORKSHOP ON HANDHOLDING SCHEME BUATSAIH A NI
content:
4940/2025-2026

Kolasib, the 20th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Deputy Commissioner Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah District Level Workshop on Handholding Scheme buatsaih a ni a. He hun hi Pu H. Lalramliana, SDO (S) chuan kaihruaiin, Pu Lalfamkima, Deputy Speaker chuan a hmanpui a ni.

Pu Lalfamkima, Deputy Speaker chuan thu sawiin, Kolasib Bawrhsap Pu Robert C. Lalhmangaiha hun lo taka a boral thut chu pawi a tih thu leh a thawng hle tih a sawi a. Mi tha tak, pa inngaitlawm leh mi kawm thiam tak a nih thu sawiin a ui takzet a ni, a ti.

Handholding Scheme chungchang sawi chhunzawmin, Bana kaih policy chu sawrkar policy pawimawh tak a ni tiin, scheme thar leh tha tak a nih avangin mipuite hnenah inzirtirna (awareness) neih tam a pawimawh thu leh he scheme in a tum berte mipuite'n an hriatthiam a tul hle a ni, a ti. Sawrkarin he scheme hi uluk takin a kalpui thu leh, a ti tak tak turte kaichhuak a, leirem an rah theih ngei nana duan a nih thu a tarlang a. A dawngtute pawhin ti hlawhtling ngei tur leh tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a ni.

He hun kaihruaitu Pu H. Lalramliana, SDO (S) pawhin tunhnaia thli leh rial avanga Kolasib district huamchhung khaw hrang hranga chhiatna thleng chungchang a tarlan bakah Kolasib District pa ber, Bawrhsap Pu Robert C. Lalhmangaiha'n a boralsan thut chu a thawng hle tih a sawi a. Pa fel leh taima, mi kawm nuam leh hna ngaipawimawh mi a nih thu sawiin, sawrkar office hrang hrang te pawhin an ui takzet thu a tarlang a ni. SDO (S) chuan mi harsa zawkten leirem an rah theih nana duan Handholding Scheme chu a dawngtuten hlawhtlingpui ngei turin duhsakna a hlan a. Sawrkar line department-te pawhin beneficiaries ten an scheme thlan te an hlawhtlinpui theih nan an theihna zawn theuhah puibawm turin a chah bawk.

Hun tiam chhungin technical session hman chhunzawm a ni a. Pu Neng Thianlala, Deputy CEO (Handholding) chuan Handholding chungchanga thil pawimawh hrang hrang sawifiahna hun hmangin zawhna leh chhanna hun a kaihruai a. Pu H. Lallianzuala, Member, MSPCC chuan Handholding Scheme chungchanga hriattur pawimawh sawifiahna leh inzirtirna hun a hmang bawk a ni. Pu JD Traite, ADM, NABARD Manager chuan KCC Scheme hnuaia loan chungchanga hriattur pawimawhte tarlangin, Pu Lalduhsaka, Asst. LDM, Kolasib hnen atangin Handholding Scheme hrang hranga loan pekchhuah tawh dan report ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

He hunah hian I&PR Office, Kolasib-in district huamchhunga Handholding Scheme success story video an buatsaih chu thlirho a ni a. Zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a nih hnuah Pi Lalrinchhani, SDC, Kolasib chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian chanvo neite kan tarlan bakah khian Pu Samuel Sailo, BDO, Bilkhawthlir leh Dr. Dorris Lalrinawmi, BDO, Thingdawl te, line department official te, Joint VC Kolasib aiawhte leh Handholding Scheme beneficiaries te an tel a ni.

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN NQAS LEH LAQSHYA CERTIFICATION LAWMNA HUN AN HMANG
content:
4939/2025-2026Dated Serchhip, the 20th March, 2026:Vawiin khan District Hospital Serchhip chuan NQAS leh LaQshya Certification lawmna hun Zotawna Park Serchhip ah an hmang a, Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan District Hospital Serchhipa thawktuten district an tihmingtha hle mai a, tehna hrang hrangah mark sang tak an hmu vek thei chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a. Damdawi ina thawktuten damdawi chauh nilovin kan tawngka chhuakin mi a tidam thei a ni tih hi kan hriat reng a tha a, damlo an lo kal a, kan lo biak danin nasa takin thu a sawi dawn a ni, tiin, mi zawng zawng an inang vek lova, thawktute tawngkam an dawnsawn dan pawh a inang vek thei lo a ni tih kan vawn reng a, an tawngka chhuak chu mi tan damna a nih rualin mi natna belhchhahtu a ni thei a ni tih vawng reng turin a chah a ni.

Kan hnathawhnaah hian thil inthlakthleng a awm zel a, thil thar a awm ang zelin thawktute pawh inzir thar zel turin a chah a. Hmasawnna nei tura mi tinin tan lak a tul thu a sawi bawk. Kan district-a damlo min enkawl saktu chungah lawmthu a sawi a, Serchhip District Hospital leh a thawktute lo vul zel turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Dy CMO Dr. Lallawmkimi chuan kan tum tak taka, rilru kan pek chuan a theih a ni tih hi a lang chiang a. Certification kan dawn theihna hi kan zaa kan thawh hona a ni tih hi a chiang a ni, a ti a. Kan thawh chhan chu mipuite anni a, a hmasa berah kan dah reng tur a ni. Certified kan nih tawh avanga chawl thei kan ni lova, hmalam pan zel tur kan ni, tiin a sawi a ni.

Dr. Beth VL Nuntluangi, District Hospital Quality Manager chuan technical report a pe a, January ni 25, 2022 khan Internal Performance Agreement hi Serchhip District Hospital hian a lo ziah tawh thu a sawi a. Damdawi in building hmasa thiah a nih tak avangin hmalak chak theih a nih loh rualin thawktute inpekna azarah ni 25 June, 2025 khan State Certification an hmuh thu a sawi bawk. Hemi hnu hian nasa lehzuala hma lain December 2026 khan National Quality Assurance Standard (NQAS) leh LaQshya Certified Hospital a puan an lo ni ta a ni, a ti a. NQAS chu damlo enkawlna leh damdawi in inrelbawlna chungchang endikna a ni a, LaQshya chu nau neihna hmun leh zai chhuahna hmunte hnathawh dan leh damlote enkawl dan endikna a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. ZD Lalmuanawma, District Medical Superintendent chuan kalkhawmna lawmna thu a sawi a. Dr. H. Lalengzauva, Senior Chief Dental Surgeon chuan lawmthu sawiin a khara ni

Attachment

title: LUNGLEIAH POL LEH LPG-A HARSATNA A THLEN LOHNA TUR SAWI HO A NI: TUN DINHMUNAH POL LEH LPG CHHEK KHAWL SA A TAM A, BUAI A HLAUHTHAWNAWM LOH
content:
4938/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 20:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin a hna thawh pindanah Lunglei District-a tuialhthei (Petroleum, Oil & Lubricants – POL) leh eirawng bawlna gas (Liquefied Petroleum Gas – LPG) dinhmun leh harsatna a awm loh nana thil pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni a. Lunglei District Level Committee on Joint Control Room member – DC Office, Police, DCSO leh DIPRO official-te, Lungleia filling station leh gas agency hrang hrang ai awhte an tel.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan tun lai khawvel ram ṭhenkhata buaina thleng boruakah India ram hmun ṭhenkhatah mipui an chi-ai avangin ni tin mamawh inchuh buai a awm tih sawiin, mipuiin mahni mamawh bak an chhek khawl chiam chuan harsatna a thlen thei zawk tih a sawi a. Sawrkar laipui, Mizoram sawrkar leh Lunglei District thuneitute pawhin ni tin mamawha harsatna a thlen loh nan theih tawp an chhuah tih sawiin, tun dinhmunah ni tin mamawh nghei hlauhthawnawm eng mah a awm lo tih a sawi a. District mipuite chu chi-ai lo tur leh mahni mamawh bak chhek khawl tum lo tura chahin, sumdawngte pawh thil chheprelh a awm loh nana fimkhur tur leh thil man tihtona remchanga hmang lo turin a chah.

He hunah hian Lunglei District chhunga ni tin mamawh hmuh kawnga harsatna a awm loh nan DC Office aṭangin March ni 16, 2026-ah Joint Control Room din a nih thu te, District Emergency Operation Centre (DEOC) chu Joint Control Room atan ruat a nih thu te, mipui chi-ai lo tur leh inrenchem tura inzirtirna theh darh a nih thu te, Supply Directorate leh DCSO pawhin mipui hriattirna an chhuah thu te tar lan a ni a. POL Filling Station leh Gas Agency ai awhte chuan tun dinhmunah POL leh LPG chhek khawl sa an nei ṭha tih sawiin, bungraw phur lirthei pawh a pangngaiin an tlan reng tih an sawi a. Tun dinhmunah POL leh LPG inchuh buai a awm loh thu te, buaina a awm a hlauhthawnawm loh thu te sawiin, eng kim tluang tak leh felfai takin a kal zel theih an beisei thu an sawi.

He ṭhut khawmah hian Joint Control Room member-te leh POL leh LPG zuarte inbiak pawh zung zung theih nan WhatsApp group siam ni se, filling station leh gas agency te'n an chhek in dinhmun ni tin report theh lut se tih a ni a. SDC, Police, DCSO, Legal Metrology, DDMA leh Agriculture lam ai awhte telna Flying Squad din niin, anni hian ni tin mamawh chheprelh, hralh ruk leh a man tihto a awm leh awm loh an endik ṭhin dawn a. Mipui mamawh hnianghnara a awm theih nan leh zirna hostel te'n harsatna an tawh loh nan te, hemi kaihhnawiha thuthang dik lo theh darh leh mipui chi-aina a thlen loh nan te a ṭul anga hma lak ni se tih a ni bawk.

Lunglei District-a POL leh LPG hnianghnar dan dinhmun te, a kaihhnawih harsatna hrang hrang te vil turin Joint Control Room siam niin, POL, LPG leh ni tin mamawh bungruate chheprelh, a mantova zuar leh mipui tichi-ai thei zawnga thu dik lo theh darh an awm chuan dan angin an chungah hma lak a ni dawn a. Hemi kaihhnawiha harsatna leh mamawh thlen duh nei chuan phone number 9862653478-ah hian Lunglei DEOC chu biak pawh theih reng a ni.

Attachment

title: CYBER CRIME CHUNGCHANG ZIRHONA ‘TRAINING ON CYBER CRIME’ NEIH A NI
content:
4937/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 20th March,2026: Vawiin chawhma khan Mizoram State Legal Services Authority (MSLSA) leh Mizoram Police tangkawp huaihawtin Gauhati High Court Aizawl Bench Conference Hall-ah ni khat awh Cyber Crime chungchanga inzirtirna ‘Training on Cyber Crime’ neih a ni a. Training hawnna inkhawmah hian Justice Pu Michael Zothankhuma, Judge, Gauhati High Court (GHC), Administration Department Judge-in-charge (JAD), GHC leh Executive Chairman, Assam State Legal Services Authority ni bawk, Justice Pu Nelson Sailo, Judge, GHC leh Executive Chairman, MSLSA ni bawk, Justice Pu Sanjeev Kumar Sharma, Judge, GHC, Pu Sharad Agarwal, Director General of Police, Govt of Mizoram leh Pi Helen Dawngliani, District & Sessions Judge, Chairman, DLSA, Aizawl Judicial District ni bawkte an tel a ni.

Justice Pu Michael Zothankhuma chuan amah ngei pawhin cyber crime a lo tawn tawh thu sawiin, cyber crime chungchang zirtirna tha tak buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Tunlai khawvelah technology hi a inthlak danglam chak hle a, dan leh hrai siam chhung erawh a rei thin avangin, sualna leh inbumna thar chi hrang hrang lo piang leh a venna tur leh hremna tur dan inkarah kar awl a awm thin thu a sawi a. He kar awl hnawhkhat tur leh cyber crime chak taka do tur chuan dan kengkawhtute, police leh judiciary-te an tan ho a ngai, a ti a. Justice Michaela chuan Judiciary-in cybercrime lam chhuina leh hremna tura digital evidence leh kawng dang hrang hranga hma an lo lak tawhte kalkhawmte hnenah hriattirin, cyber crime laka invenhimna hmasa ber leh pawimawh ber chu mipui zirtirna (Public awareness) a nih thu a sawi a. Kalkhawmte chu training hlawkthlak tak nei turin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Justice Pu Nelson Sailo pawhin kalkhawmte hnenah thu sawiin, kum 2017 khan Supreme Court chuan ‘Right to Privacy’ chu India ram Danpui hnuaia Article 21 hnuaiah Fundamental Rights zinga pawm a lo nih tak thu leh he thutlukna zulzuiin Parliament pawhin kum 2023 khan mitinte anmahni data venhimna chanvo (right) humhalh saktu, Digital Personal and Data Protection Act (DPDP Act) 2023 chu a pass tawh thu a sawi a. Justice Nelson Sailo chuan India ramah cyber crime a pung chho nasa tih sawiin, kum 2023 khan case 86,000 chuang file a ni a, Mizoramah pawh kum 2022-2026 chhungin cyber crime case 361 a awm a, kumin bikah March thla thleng khan case 5 file a nih tawh thu a tarlang bawk a. Heng case zingah hian financial fraud, social media impersonation leh sexual harrasment case-te a tam zual a. Cyber crime laka inveng turin mipuite chu antivirus software hman te, file hriatloh hawn emaw download mai loh te leh police station-ah a rang thei ang bera report vat a tul thu a sawi.

Thusawitu dang DGP Pu Sharad Agarwal chuan cyber crime nasa taka a pun avangin dan kengkawhtute tan a lu hai thlak thu a sawi a. Tunlai thiamna Artificial Intelligence (AI) hmangin thlalak (phishing) leh video lem (deepfake) a darh nasa a, AI chu password pawimawh ruk chhuah nante leh virus thehdarh nan hman thin a nih thu a sawi a. Cyber crime laka inven nan Mizoram Police chuan Technical Support Cell a din tawh thu leh data him leh him loh endik nan digital forensic tool-te pawh an hman tangkai tawh thu a sawi.

Pi Helen Dawngliani pawhin thusawiin, cyber crime chi hrang hrang a tarlang a. Tunlai thiamna (technology) avang hian kawng hrang hrangah hma kan sawnin, thil tih awlsam phah mahse sual pawh a tih pun thu a sawi a. Dan hnuaia him taka mipuite kan awm tlan theih nan police leh judiciary-te an tan ho a pawimawh lehzual thu a sawi.

Training hawnna inkhawm zawhah hian technical session tan niin, Dr. Harold D’Costa, Cyber Security Corporation and International Trainer – Digital Forensics & Cyber Law President chuan training a kaihruai a, Pu Zonunsanga, SP, Cyber Crime leh Pi JH Lalparmawii, JMFC cum Civil Judge (Jr. Div), District Court, Aizawl te pawhin cybercrime chungchang zirtirna an pe a. Pi Meghna Yadav, IGP (Training) chuan technical session kharna hun a hmang a. Home, Excise & Narcotics, Finance leh sawrkar department hrang hranga thawkte mi thahnem takin he training hi an chhim a ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT WATER & SANITATION MISSION COMMITTEE AN ṬHUKHAWM
content:
4936/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 20 March, 2026: Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00P.M. khan DC Mini Conference hall, Siahaah District Water & Sanitation Mission Committee-an ṭhukhawm a, Pu Vanlalchhuanliana, SDO (Sadar) chuan he hun hi a kaihruai.

Pu Vanlalchhuanliana chuan member kal khawmte inlawmna thu sawiin, tui chu mi tin mamawh; a tel lova awm theih loh a ni a, chuvangin Public Health Engineering department chauh ni lovin department hrang hrang nen tuihna tipung tura thingphun kawngah emaw tui kawng enkawl leh ruahtui khawlkhawm chungchangah emaw ṭanrual a ngai a ni, a ti.

Er. Viasai Solo, Member Secretary, DW&SM leh Sr. EE PHED Siaha district nibawk chuan kum hmasa lama committee hmalakna hrang hrang a tarlan bakah state leh national lam aṭanga committee kal zel dan tura ruahmanna an lo siam a sawi a, rorel neih chhunzawm a ni.

Member Secretary Er. Viasai Solo chuan Jal Jeevan Mission hi kum 2019 a bulṭan niin kum 2024-ah a tawp tawh a, chutih rualin hemi scheme hnuaiah hian programme kal lai eng emaw zat a awm thu a sawi. March 8 aṭanga 22 hi Jal Mahotsav (Water Festival) 2026 a ni a, hemi pual hian khaw hrang hrangah Jal Arpan Diwas leh Lok Jal Utsav hman a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Jal Jeevan Mission hnuaia hnathawh reng reng hi khaw tina khawtlang ṭangrual thlanchhuah, district committee-in a thlitfim leh state-in a pawmpui hnua thawh ṭhin chauh ni mah se khawvel hmasawnna leh thil thleng danglam zelah enzui ngai awm nia hriat anih avangin service improvement plan siam nise tih chu sawiho a ni a, lungrual taka pawm tlan a ni.

Thingtlang khaw tinin tui hnianghnar zawka an neih theihna tur leh department mite thiamna khawtlangin an chhawr theihna tura hma la turin District Technical Unit din tura tih anih angin din a ni a, member-te chu:-1. Leader – Executive Engineer, PHED, Saiha WATSAN Division, Siaha2. Consultant – Superintending Engineer, PHED, Lunglei WATSAN Circle, Lunglei3. Secretary – Sub-Divisional Officer, PHED, Maintenance Sub-Division, Siaha

Member te:1. Sub-Divisional Officer, PHED, Rural WATSAN Sub-Division, Siaha2. Hydro-geologist, PHED, Aizawl3. Chemist, District Laboratory, PHED, Siaha4. All Junior Engineers, PHED, SAIHA WATSAN Division, Siaha

Vawiin ṭhutkhawmah hian District Water & Sanitation Mission Committee an tel kim hle a - Pu M. Misael, PD, DRDO, Dr. Lalchhuanliana, Dy. CMO, Pu T. Beihronga Deputy Conservator of Forests (MADC), Er. Lalmuanpuia, SDO, PHED, Pu John Lalnunsanga, DIPRO aiawh leh PHED official-te an tel a, Chairman-in lawmthu sawina a neih hnuin ṭhutkhawm ṭin a ni.

Attachment

title: PU. C. SAWIVUNGA, ART & CULTURE MINISTER-IN THANGRAM CULTURAL MEET - 2026 TAWP ZAN HMANPUI
content:
4935/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 20th of March, 2026 :Pu C. Sawivunga, Hon'ble Minister, Art & Culture chuan nizan khan Ronpur, Assam-a Thangram Cultural Meet-2026 Thangram Indigenous People Movement leh Mizo Zirlai Pawl te'n an buatsaih chu a tawp zanah Khual lian niin a hmanpui.

Khushi lian chuan Thangram Cultural Meet hmang tura kalkhawmte chibai bukin, Zo hnahthlak peng hrang hrangte chu kan chenna leilungin min daidang rih mahse kan unauna erawh engmahin a then hrang tur a nilo a ti a. Kan awmna hmun theuhah India khua leh tui tha kan ni tur a ni a, khua leh tui tha in a tih tur hrang hrangte midangte tana hnawklo tura khawsak kan tum tur a ni a ti. Cultural meet zalen leh hlim tak, boruak muanawm tak hnuaia hman a ni chu thenawm State Assam Sawrkar chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Thangram Cultural meet hman a nih theihna tura hmahruaitu hrang hrangte chungah lawmthu sawiin, he hun hman a nih theih nana sulsutu pawimawh leh Zofate inlungrualna leh inremna ngaipawimawh Mizoram Chief Minister hmalakna a fakawm hle a, Mizo Zirlai Pawl leh Thangram Indigenous People Movement te chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk. Cultural meet hman a ni chuan Thangram chhehvela cheng Zofate inlungrualna tha leh zual thlen se a duh thu sawiin, Mizo Culture vawng nung zel chungin Zonun zemawi tlawmngaihna,ais upate zahna, hawihhawmna te chhi chhuak zel ila,Zofatw tana Pathianin a hun ruat a thlen hunah chuan engmah daidangtu neiloin kan la khawsa ho dawn a, chumi thleng thei tura kan awmna hmun theuhah mizo kan nihna inhrereng chunga mawi taka khawsa turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA Adviser to CM pawhin thusawiin, Thangram leh a chhhevela chengte chu Mizoram Sawrkar chuan a lawm che u a, British hun lai atangin zofate chu hmun hran hranah then darh kan ni a, insuihkhawm lehna tura ram hruaitu, tlawmngaipawl hrang hrang kaltlanga hmalakna-ah hmasawnna hmuh a ni zelte hi Pathian hian min hriatpui tlat a ni tih a chiang a, a hunah chuan ram khatah inlungrual takin kan la khawsa ho dawn a ni a ti bawk.

Thangram Cultural Meet hmanna hi Ronpur Assam-ah neih a ni a, Kum 2021 khan Cultural Meet hi lo neih a ni tawh bawk. Helai chhehvelah hian Chorei, Sakachep, Hrangkhawl, Ranglong, Molsom leh Kaipeng te an cheng a ni.

Horticulture Minister hian Zawlnuam a Horticulture Department rama mau sawngbawlna hmun tur tlawh nghalin, buaipui ngai la awmte a theih anga ranga bawhzui a tum thu a sawi.

Thangram Cultural Meet tawp zan Ronpur-a hmanah hian Dr. C. Lalremruata, President, MZP leh Ronpur khawtlang aiawhte atangin thusawina ngaihthlak a ni a, Mizo Zirlai Pawl, Cultural Troupe te leh Thangram chhunga cheng te'n hnam lam chi hrang hrang an entir bakah zaithiamte an zai bawk a ni.

Pu C. Lalsawivunga, Minister hi Pu Lalsangliana, Secretary, AH & Very, Pu CH. Lalmuanpuia, Director Horticulture, Pu F. Lalthanmawia, Jt. Director, Art & Culture, Pu Vanlaltlana Zote, PS leh Pu B. Lalchamliana, DHO, Mamit te'n an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah Mizoram Civil Pensioners’ Association, Serchhip District Headquarters General Conference neih a ni
content:
4934/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 20th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Civil Pensioners’ Association, Serchhip District Headquarters chuan Serchhip Kawnpui VC Hall ah General Conference an hmang a. Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan Pensioner te chu Pathian malsawmna dawnga pension thlenga an hna an thawk thei leh tun thleng maia damna tha an nei chu a ropui a tih thu a sawi a. An thawh rahah an tu leh faten vawiin kan lo hman theih phah a ni, a ti. Hun tam tak an lo paltlang tawhte leh an tawnhriatte pawh midang tan a hlu em em a, khawtlang leh chhungkaw tana mi hlu an ni a ti bawk. Kan khawtlang nuna harsatna kan tawh tam tak laimu chu kan chhungkuaah a ni a, pensionerte chu hun thawl ngah zawk an nih angin tawngtaina nen min beih sak rawh u, tiin a sawm a ni.

Pawl hlu taka memberte chu tang ho zel tura chahin mahnia tih theih loh hi pawl ang chuan tih theih a ni mai thin a ni tiin, hriselna tha nei a, khawtlang ti mawitu ni zel tura chahin, tuna sawrkar hnathawkte pawh tawngtai sak zel turin a sawm a ni.

Serchhip District Headquarters Secretary Pu R. Lalhnuna chuan report pein an pawl chu pensioner thahnemngai ten April ni 1, 1999 an din a nih thu a sawi a. Tunah hian Serchhip District Headquarters chhungah member 1000 bawr vel awmin, branch 10 an awm thu a sawi bawk.

MCPA Gen Headquarters Secretary Pu F. Lalrinawma pawhin thusawiin pensioner te zingah harsatna in a tlakbuak te hnenah Endowment fund pek thin a nih thu sawiin, Serchhip District Headquarters member mi 6 hnenah Endowment fund Rs. 4000 theuh a hlan nghal a ni.

He hun hi Serchhip District Headquarters President Pu Lalzuiliana’n a kaihruai a. Chawhnuah hruaitu thar thlanna hun an hmang a ni.

Attachment

title: ENG CHHIT MAN CHUNGCHANGAH MZERC-IN PUBLIC HEARING NEI
content:
4933/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 20th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Power & Electricity Department-in kum 2026-27 atana eng chhit man (Electricity tariff) a rawtna chungchangah Mizoram Electricity Regulatory Commission (MZERC) chuan Public Hearing a nei.

Public Hearing hi MZERC Chairperson, Pu Benjamin L.Tlumtea kaihhruaina-in Aijal Club-ah neih a ni a. Hun bituk chhunga mipuite'n rawtna leh sawiselna thu an thlente leh P&E department-in an chhannate ngaihthlak a ni.

Kum kal mek 2025-2026 leh kum hmasa 2024-25 -ahte khan eng chhit man hi tihsan a lo ni tawh lova, tuna P&E department-in rawtna a thehluhah pawh hian eng chhit man tihsan rawtna a awm lova, mipui atanga Revenue sum mamawh zat (ARR) a hmuh tlin lohna chu Sawrkarin subsidy-in a peksak dawn a ni. MZERC chuan ngun taka a zir chian hnu-ah kum thar FY 2026-27 atana Sawrkar pek tur subsidy leh eng chhit man tur zat hi a bithliah dawn a ni.

Multi-Year Tariff Regulations, 2014-in a phut angin P&E department hian kum tinin mipui hnena power supply enkawl nana sum leh pai a mamawh (Aggregate Revenue Requirement) leh, eng chhit man bithliah chungchanga rawtna a neihte chu Commission hnenah a theh lut thin a. A rawtna hi newspaper-ah chhuahin mipui vantlang (consumers leh stakeholders) tan sawiselna hun emaw, thurawn pekna hun emaw hawn thin a ni a. Sawiselna emaw, thurawn emaw pe duhte chuan MZERC hnenah ziakin (Affidavit hmangin) an thehlut thin a ni.

Attachment
